application.title: UK-Switzerland CR&D Round 3
application.automation_next_action: Use the formal partner evidence request PDF pack to obtain Swiss implementation partner, research institute or waiver, budget, permits/licences, export-control and Project Impact evidence before completing remaining IFS sections or final submission.

incomplete_sections: Q17 Costs and value for money

finance_readback.finance_status: Incomplete; no partner costs, total eligible costs, grant request or company contribution entered.

portal_readback.security_note: Existing IFS account session was used for readback; runtime sign-in secret was not written to any artifact.

drive_searches_reviewed.finding: Returned Aureon planning and war-room records; no confirmed Swiss implementation partner, research institute commitment, waiver, signed partner letter or partner budget.
Returned broad planning or technical material; no clean maritime lead, vessel, trial site, permit, safety case or eligible-cost budget evidence.
Returned evidence and planning records useful for narrative support, but not route-unlocking commitments or budgets for the live UK-Swiss draft.

local_searches_reviewed.finding: Existing grant artifacts repeatedly identify the UK-Switzerland route as partner, waiver/research-institute, budget, permit and export-control gated.
Searches found technical/research material and draft outreach records, but no confirmed Swiss partner, research institute or waiver, signed commitment, partner budget or cost split.
Prior evidence discovery also recorded no confirmed Swiss implementation partner, research institute or waiver, partner commitment, partner budget, person-month split or total eligible-cost basis.
Contains candidate Swiss outreach targets and evidence requirements; it is a pipeline, not commitment evidence.

decision.why_q4_not_completed: Q4 is a legal/technical permits declaration with binary options. The current draft and evidence base still depend on final Swiss partner and technical scope, so selecting No or Not applicable would be unsupported.
decision.why_q6_not_completed: Q6 is an export-control declaration with binary options. The current draft says final partner scope must be checked for controlled hardware, data, IP and dual-use exposure before submission.
decision.why_submit_not_possible: IFS readback shows incomplete finances, Project Impact, award terms and review/submit. The finance readback is zero-cost and cannot support a truthful grant submission.

next_actions: Keep the live UK-Switzerland IFS draft open only as a staged application until partner, waiver/research-institute, budget, permit and export-control evidence exists.
Use the existing partner evidence request pack and partner outreach pipeline to obtain the missing Swiss implementation partner and budget evidence.
Do not complete Q4, Q6, project finances, Project Impact, award terms, partner invite, upload, or final review/submit without evidence and exact action-time approval.
Continue checking remaining IFS routes against the ledger for any newly evidenced submit-ready route.
controls: No IFS form answer was changed during the readback session.
No Q4 permit/licence declaration was made without confirmed technical and partner scope.
No Q6 export-control declaration was made without partner/export evidence.
No project finance, Project Impact, award terms, upload, partner invite or final submit action was performed.
No external email was sent by this artifact.
No runtime sign-in secret was stored.
